                          Search Results

                            Luminas | Expedition 33 Wiki


                            Luminas in Clair Obscur Expedition 33 are passive abilities that are associated with Pictos. Luminas are only singular passive effects and do not come with the extra bonuses for combat stats that are included in a Pictos. There is no limit as to how many Luminas a character can equip but it requires you to have the required number of Lumina Points to equip them. By default, the total number of each character's Lumina Points is the same as the character's level. So, for example, if one of your characters is at Level 20, then that character has 20 Lumina Points that he or she can use to equip Luminas.

                            All Pictos are associated with the Luminas passive effect, and these can be learned or unlocked, and shared by all Characters by equipping a Pictos on an active party member and winning 4 battle encounters. Upon winning 4 battle encounters, the associated Luminas of that Pictos will appear in the list of Luminas.

                            To identify this, a Lumina that has not been learned will not have a gold borderline around its icon. Whenever you win a battle encounter, one line will appear around the icon. And if you win 4 battles, then it will be a complete diamond-shaped gold borderline which indicates the Luminas is unlocked or learned.

                            As far as tinkering with builds for each character, managing Pictos and Luminas is vital, as each Pictos is associated with one or two combat stats that can scale or improve its values. When equipping Pictos and Luminas, you should consider your attributes and the weapon you have equipped for each character, since each weapon also has its corresponding attributes that scale. This page covers a list of all Luminas and their costs found in Clair Obscur: Expedition 33.

                             

                            Clair Obscur Expedition 33 All Luminas Guide

                            NEW in Expedition 33 DLC Update: Craft and Filter Your Own Lumina Sets

                            The Thank You Update DLC in Expedition 33 brings a new Quality of Life feature to the game. You can now save up to 50 Lumina Sets to switch between different Character builds and loadouts. This new feature will help players save time from scanning through the long list of Luminas to change their build, and cut down preparation time. This feature can be accessed in the Lumina menu, where you can preview all of your acquired Luminas. Each set will also show the total amount of Luminas that you have curated in that specific set and rename it so you can easily identify the build that you have created. Players can create up to 50 Lumina Sets for their Characters.

                            Aside from the Lumina Sets, the Thank You Update also added new Luminas that will expand more build options for the Characters. There's also a new filter setting that lets you sort your characters based on the following attributes: Base Attack, Critical, Speed, AP, Shield, Mark, Debuff, Status Effect, Death, Gradient, and more. 

                             

                            Clair Obscur Expedition 33 Beginner Guide

                             

                            How to Get More Lumina Points in Expedition 33?

                            The traditional method for increasing the Lumina Points for each character is by leveling up. However, you can use a Tint item, the Colour of Lumina, to increase the number of Lumina Points. Adding Lumina Points only costs 1 Colour of Lumina per Lumina Point added to the character. These cannot be respec and are permanent. So use them wisely.

                            To upgrade Lumina Points, you can interact with The Curator at Camp and choose the option to upgrade the Expeditioner's Resources. As you progress through the game, you can use any Expedition Flag to upgrade the expedition's resources.

                            How and Where do I get Colour of Lumina in Clair Obscur Expedition 33?

                            Colour of Lumina can be acquired in various ways, such as loot, occasional random drops from defeating enemies, unique (one-time) drops from defeating Bosses or special enemies that do not respawn, purchased from Gestral Merchants, or acquired as reward for completing side quests.

                             

                            All Luminas in Clair Obscur Expedition 33

                             

                            Quick Search of All Luminas in Clair Obscur Expedition 33

                            Pictos Name
                            Luminas Effect
                            Double Third
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Every third hit of a Skill deals double damage. 10
                            SOS Healing Tint
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Consume a Healing Tint when falling below 50% Health. 10
                            Damage Share
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 50% damage taken is redirected to other allies (if possible). 30
                            Empowering Jumps
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Counters deal 100% more damage for each successful Jump Counter this turn. 5
                            Gradient Parry
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 +5% of a gradient charge on Parry. 10
                            Slowing Attack
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Base attack applies Slow for 1 turn. 10
                            Clea's Death
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 On death, allies gain 25% increased damage until they die. 15
                            Feint
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Start each turn with 4 Barbapapa stacks. Every 5th hit with a Skill deals 600% more damage. 15
                            Gradient Overcharge
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 On turn start, consume 3 Gradient Charges (if able) to deal 200% more damage this turn. 15
                            Longer Break
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Breaks last 1 more turn but the target can't be Broken twice. 10
                            Alternating Critical
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 On Critical hit, 100% increased damage of the next non-Critical hit. 10
                            Trigger-Happy
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 After shooting 10 times in the same turn, gain +2 AP (once). And following Shots this turn deal 200% more damage. 20
                            AP Discount
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Skills cost 1 less AP. 30
                            Consuming Attack
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Consuming Attack Lumina Effects 10
                            Empowered Healer
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Using a Healing Skill gives 50% more damage for 1 turn. 10
                            First Life
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 25% increased damage until death. 20% decreased damage on death. (Once) 15
                            Frenzy
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Each successive Skill hit deals 10% more damage. 20

                            Accelerating Heal
                            		 Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn 5

                            Accelerating Last Stand
                            		 Gain Rush if fighting alone. 3

                            Accelerating Shots
                            		 20% change to gain Rush on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Accelerating Tint
                            		 Healing Tints also apply Rush 5

                            Aegis Revival
                            		 +1 Shield on being revived. 5

                            Anti-Blight
                            		 Immune to Blight. 10

                            Anti-Burn
                            		 Immune to Burn. 15

                            Anti-Charm
                            		 Immune to Charm. 10

                            Anti-Freeze
                            		 Immune to Freeze. 15

                            Anti-Stun
                            		 Immune to Stun. 5

                            At Death's Door
                            		 Deal 50% more damage if Health is below 10%. 5

                            Attack Lifesteal
                            		 Recover 15% Health on Base Attack. 15

                            Augmented Aim
                            		 50% increased Free Aim damage. 3

                            Augmented Attack
                            		 50% increased Base Attack damage. 7

                            Augmented Counter I
                            		 25% increased Counterattack damage. 3

                            Augmented Counter II
                            		 50% increased Counterattack damage. 5

                            Augmented Counter III
                            		 75% increased Counterattack damage. 7

                            Augmented First Strike
                            		 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle. 5

                            Auto Death
                            		 Kill self on battle start. 1

                            Auto Powerful
                            		 Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Regen
                            		 Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Rush
                            		 Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Shell
                            		 Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Base Shield
                            		 +1 Shield if not affected by any Shield on turn start. 20

                            Beneficial Contamination
                            		 +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn. 15

                            Break Specialist
                            		 Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%. 1

                            Breaker
                            		 25% increased Break damage. 10

                            Breaking Attack
                            		 Base Attack can Break. 10

                            Breaking Burn
                            		 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies. 5

                            Breaking Counter
                            		 50% increased Break damage on Counterattack. 3

                            Breaking Death
                            		 Fully charge enemy's Break Bar on death. 5

                            Breaking Shots
                            		 50% increased Break damage with Free Aim Shots. 1

                            Breaking Slow
                            		 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies.  5

                            Burn Affinity
                            		 25% increased damage on Burning Targets. 10

                            Burning Break
                            		 Apply 3 Burn stacks on Breaking a target.  3

                            Burning Death
                            		 Apply 3 Burn to all enemies on Death. 5

                            Burning Mark
                            		 Apply Burn on hitting a Marked enemy. 15

                            Burning Shots
                            		 20% chance to Burn on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Charging Alteration
                            		 +10% of a Gradient Charge on applying a Buff. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Attack
                            		 +15% of a Gradient Charge on Base Attack. 7

                            Charging Burn
                            		 +20% of a Gradient Charge on applying Burn. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Counter
                            		 +20% of a Gradient Charge on Counterattack. 10

                            Charging Critical
                            		 +20% of a Gradient Charge on Critical Hit. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Mark
                            		 +20% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Marked target. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Stun
                            		 +5% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Stunned enemy. 5

                            Charging Tint
                            		 +5% of a Gradient Charge on using an item. 2

                            Charging Weakness
                            		 +15% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Weakness. Once per turn. 5

                            Cheater
                            		 Always play twice in a row. 40

                            Cleansing Tint
                            		 Healing Tints also remove all Status Effects from the target. 5

                            Clea's Life
                            		 On turn start, if no damage taken since last turn, recover 100% Health. 30

                            Combo Attack I
                            		 Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 10

                            Combo Attack II
                            		 Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 20

                            Combo Attack III
                            		 Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 30

                            Confident
                            		 Take 50% less damage, but can't be Healed. 20

                            Confident Fighter
                            		 30% increased damage, but can't be Healed. 15

                            Critical Break
                            		 25% increased Break damage on Critical Hits. 5

                            Critical Burn
                            		 25% increased Critical Chance on Burning enemies. 5

                            Critical Moment
                            		 50% increased Critical Chance if Health is below 30%. 5

                            Critical Stun
                            		 100% on Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target. 5

                            Critical Vulnerability
                            		 25% increased Critical Chance on Defenceless enemies. 5

                            Critical Weakness
                            		 25% increased Critical Chance on Weakness. 5

                            Dead Energy I
                            		 +3 AP on killing an enemy. 2

                            Dead Energy II
                            		 +3 AP on killing an enemy. 2

                            Death Bomb
                            		 On Death, deal damage to all enemies. 5

                            Defensive Mode
                            		 On receiving damage, consume 1 AP to take 30% less damage, if possible. 1

                            Dodger
                            		 Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn. 1

                            Double Burn
                            		 On applying a Burn stack, apply a second one. 30

                            Double Mark
                            		 Mark requires 1 more hit to be removed.  20

                            Draining Cleanse
                            		 Consume 1 AP to prevent Status Effects application, if possible. 15

                            Effective Heal
                            		 Double all Heals received. 30

                            Effective Support
                            		 +2 AP on using an item. 5

                            Empowering Attack
                            		 Gain Powerful for 1 turn on Base Attack. 10

                            Empowering Break
                            		 Gain Powerful on Breaking a target. 3

                            Empowering Dodge
                            		 5% increased damage for each consecutive successful Dodge. Can stack up to 10 times. 5

                            Empowering Last Stand
                            		 Gain Powerful if fighting alone. 3

                            Empowering Parry
                            		 Each successful Parry increases damage by 5% until end of the following turn. Taking any damage removes this buff.  5

                            Empowering Tint
                            		 Healing Tints also apply Powerful. 5

                            Energetic Healer                            		 +2AP on Healing an ally. Once per turn. 10

                            Energising Attack I
                            		 +1 AP on Base Attack. 10

                            Energising Attack II
                            		 +1 AP on Base Attack. 15

                            Energising Break
                            		 +3 AP on Breaking a target. 3



                            Energising Burn

                            		 +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn. 10

                            Energising Cleanse
                            		 Dispel the first negative Status Effect received an gain 2 AP. 10

                            Energising Death
                            		 On death, +4 AP to allies. 5

                            Energising Gradient
                            		 +1 AP per Gradient Charge consumed. 10

                            Energising Heal
                            		 On Healing an ally, also give 2 AP. 10

                            Energising Jump
                            		 +1 AP on Jump Counterattack. 5

                            Energising Pain
                            		 No longer gain AP on Parry. +1AP on getting hit. 10

                            Energising Parry
                            		 +1 AP on successful Parry. 15

                            Energising Powerful
                            		 Give 2 AP on applying Powerful. 10

                            Energising Revive
                            		 +3 AP to all allies when revived. 5

                            Energising Rush
                            		 Give 2 AP on applying Rush. 10

                            Energising Shell
                            		 Give 2 AP on applying Shell. 10

                            Energising Shots
                            		 20% chance to gain 1 AP on Free Aim shot. 10

                            Energising Start I
                            		 +1 AP on battle start. 5

                            Energising Start II
                            		 +1 AP on battle start. 10

                            Energising Start III
                            		 +1 AP on battle start. 15

                            Energising Start IV
                            		 +1 AP on battle start. 20

                            Energising Stun
                            		 +1 AP on hitting a Stunned target with a Skill. 10

                            Energising Turn
                            		 +1 AP on turn start. 20

                            Energy Master
                            		 Every AP gain is increased by 1. 40

                            Enfeebling Attack
                            		 Base Attack applies Powerless for 1 turn. 10

                            Enfeebling Mark
                            		 Marked targets deal 30% less damage. 10

                            Exhausting Power
                            		 50% increased damage if Exhausted. 2

                            Exposing Attack
                            		 Base Attack applies Defenseless for 1 turn. 10

                            Exposing Break
                            		 Apply Defenceless on Break. 5

                            Faster Than Strong
                            		 Always play twice in a row, but deal 50% less damage. 10

                            First Offensive
                            		 First hit dealt and taken deals 50% more damage. 5

                            First Strike
                            		 Play first. 10

                            Fueling Break
                            		 Breaking a target doubles its Burn amount. 5

                            Full Strength
                            		 25% increased damage on full Health. 15



                            Glass Canon

                            		 Deal 25% more damage, but take 25% more damage. 10

                            Gradient Break
                            		 +50% of a Gradient Charge on Breaking a target. 5

                            Gradient Breaker
                            		 50% increased Breaking damage with Gradient Attacks. 5

                            Gradient Fighter
                            		 +25% increased damage with Gradient Attacks. 5

                            Greater Defenceless
                            		 +15% to Defenceless damage amplification. 15

                            Greater Powerful
                            		 +15% to Powerful damage increase. 10

                            Greater Powerless
                            		 +15% to Powerless damage reduction. 15

                            Greater Rush
                            		 +25% Rush Speed increase. 10

                            Greater Shell
                            		 +10% to Shell damage reduction. 10

                            Greater Slow
                            		 +15% to Slow Speed reduction. 15

                            Healing Boon
                            		 Heal 15% HP on applying a buff. 10

                            Healing Counter
                            		 Recover 25% Health on Counterattack. 10

                            Healing Death
                            		 On death, the rest of the Expedition recover all Health. 5

                            Healing Fire
                            		 Recover 25% Health when attacking a Burning target. Once per turn. 10

                            Healing Mark
                            		 Recover 25% Health on hitting a Marked enemy. Once per turn. 20

                            Healing Parry
                            		 Recover 3% Health on Parry. 5

                            Healing Share
                            		 Receive 15% of all Heals affecting other characters. 5

                            Healing Stun
                            		 Recover 5% Health on hitting a Stunned target. 10

                            Healing Tint Energy
                            		 Healing Tints also give 1 AP. 1

                            Immaculate
                            		 30% increased damage until a hit is received. 10

                            In Medias Res
                            		 +3 Shields on Battle Start, but max Health is halved. 10

                            Inverted Affinity
                            		 Apply Inverted on self for 3 turns on battle start. 50% increased damage while Inverted. 5

                            Last Stand Critical
                            		 100% Critical Chance while fighting alone. 3

                            Longer Burn
                            		 Burn duration is increased by 2. 15

                            Longer Powerful
                            		 On applying Powerful, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Longer Rush
                            		 On applying Rush, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Longer Shell
                            		 On applying Shell, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Marking Break
                            		 Apply Mark on Break. 5

                            Marking Shots
                            		 20% chance to apply Mark on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Painted Power
                            		 Damage can exceed 9,999. 5

                            Painter
                            		 Convert all Physical damage to Void damage. 10

                            Perilous Parry
                            		 +1 AP on Parry, but damage received is doubled. 5

                            Piercing Shot
                            		 25% increased Free Aim damage. Free Aim shots ignore Shields. 2

                            Powered Attack
                            		 On every damage dealt, try to consume 1 AP. If successful, increase damage by 20. 10

                            Powerful Heal
                            		 Healing an ally also applies Powerful for 1 turn. 5

                            Powerful Mark
                            		 Gain Powerful on hitting a Marked enemy. 5

                            Powerful on Shell
                            		 Apply Powerful on applying Shell. 10

                            Powerful Revive
                            		 Apply Powerful for 3 turns when revived. 3

                            Powerful Shield
                            		 10% increased damage per Shield Point on self. 5

                            Powerful Shots
                            		 20% chance to gain Powerful on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Pro Retreat
                            		 Allows Flee to be instantaneous. 40

                            Protecting Attack
                            		 Gain Shell for 1 turn on Base Attack. 10

                            Protecting Death
                            		 On death, allies gain Shell. 5

                            Protecting Heal
                            		 Healing an ally also applies Shell for 1 turn. 5

                            Protecting Last Stand
                            		 Gain Shell if fighting alone. 3

                            Protecting Shots                            		 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Protecting Tint
                            		 Healing Tints also apply Shell. 5

                            Quick Break
                            		 Play again on Breaking a target. 3

                            Random Defense
                            		 Damage taken is randomly multiplied by a value between 50% and 200%. 5

                            Recovery
                            		 Recovers 10% Health on turn start. (Reward for spending Chroma at the Red Woods Nevron quest) 10

                            Rejuvenating Revive
                            		 Apply Regen for 3 turns when revived. 3

                            Revive Paradox
                            		 Play immediately when revived.  5

                            Revive Tint Energy
                            		 Revive Tints also give 3 AP. 10

                            Rewarding Mark
                            		 +2 AP on dealing damage to a Marked target. Once per turn. 5

                            Roulette
                            		 Every hit has a 50% chance to deal either 50% or 200% of its damage. 5

                            Rush on Powerful
                            		 Apply Rush on applying Powerful. 10

                            Shell On Rush
                            		 Apply Shell on applying Rush. 10

                            SOS Power
                            		 Apply Powerful when falling below 50% Health. 5

                            SOS Rush
                            		 Apply Rush when falling below 50% Health. 5

                            SOS Shell
                            		 Apply Shell when falling below 50% Health  5

                            Second Chance
                            		 Revive with 100% Health. Once per battle. 40

                            Shared Care
                            		 When healing an ally, also Heal self for 50% of that value. 10

                            Shield Affinity
                            		 30% increased damage while having Shields, but receiving any damage always removes all Shields. 15

                            Shielding Death
                            		 On death, allies gain 3 Shield points. 10

                            Shielding Tint
                            		 Healing Tints also add 2 Shields. 10

                            Shortcut
                            		 Immediately play when falling below 30% Health. Once per battle. 5

                            Slowing Break
                            		 Apply Slow on Break. 5

                            Sniper
                            		 First Free Aim shot each turn deals 200% increased damage and can Break. 15

                            Solidifying
                            		 +2 Shields when the character's Health falls below 50%. Once per battle. 10

                            Solo Fighter
                            		 Deal 50% more damage if fighting alone. 1

                            Staggering Attack
                            		 50% increased Break damage on Base Attack. 1

                            Stay Marked
                            		 50% chance to apply Mark when attacking a Marked target. 10

                            Stun Boost
                            		 30% increased damage on Stunned targets. 10

                            Survivor
                            		 Survive fatal damage with 1 Health. Once per battle. 20

                            Sweet Kill
                            		 Recover 50% Health on killing an enemy. 5

                            Tainted
                            		 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on self. 3

                            Teamwork
                            		 10% increased damage while all allies are alive. 5

                            The One
                            		 Max Health is reduced to 1. 1

                            Time Tint
                            		 Energy Tints also apply Rush. 5

                            Versatile
                            		 After a Free Aim hit, Base Attack damage is increased by 50% for 1 turn. 5

                            Warming Up
                            		 5% increased damage per turn. Can stack up to 5 times. 15

                            Weakness Gain
                            		 +1AP on hitting an enemy's Weakness. Once per turn. 3

                             




                            Join the page discussion Tired of anon posting? Register!
                              • Anonymous
                                29 Jul 2025 08:57  

                                Time Tint costs 10 Luminas, not 5.
                                So the total cost should be 1730

                                ReplyReplies (0)

                                3

                                +1

                                0

                                -1
                                • Anonymous
                                  09 Jul 2025 00:05  

                                  So I did the math using this page, and it's 1,725 lumina points needed (per character) to be able to equip every Lumina if you have every Pictos.

                                  ReplyReplies (0)

                                  3

                                  +1

                                  1

                                  -1
                                  • Anonymous
                                    12 Jun 2025 07:39  

                                    I added together all of the Lumina costs and landed ona total of 1643 - so, accounting for me making an error and the list being incomplete, roughly 1800-2000 Lumina per Character should be enough to be able to run all pictos. Since running ALL pictos doesn't make sense, I feel 1500 Lumina is a reasonable stopping point.

                                    ReplyReplies (2)

                                    2

                                    +1

                                    2

                                    -1
                                    • Anonymous
                                      10 Jun 2025 08:29  

                                      Is there a way to add the total number of lumina points needed to allocate every single lumina, and to make it so that it updates from the table (so that if new luminas are added, the total number doesn't need to be updated) ?

                                                11 May 2025 19:10  

                                                There's no mention here whether or not there's a limit to how many points any one character can have. I assume there's not, but It would be nice to know for sure.

                                                  10 May 2025 02:40  

                                                  You are missing the Breaking Slow Lumina

                                                  ReplyReplies (0)

                                                  +1

                                                  -1
                                                  • Anonymous
                                                    06 May 2025 03:07  

                                                    I think its DIRE to say that the main reason of Expedition 33 suceeding is solely because of Gustave's Lumina Converter. AFAIK, all of the previous expeditioners might only be able to utilize pictos, which in a gameplay sense it can increase their stats, yes, but without all the added passive benefits from Lumina, they always fall short. Tribute to them though, they're all basically the best of the best amongst men.
